text: Stepping into the bright, open entryway, I am struck by a sense of calm and anticipation. The clean lines and empty spaces seem to hold silent questions. Moving on, I face a wall buzzing with color and the promise of ideas—R+D, research and development. Here, curiosity is invited and creative optimism fills the air. I feel both the gravity of possibility and the gentle push to participate in the unfolding narrative of innovation. To be in a place dedicated to discovery is to be quietly exhilarated by the endlessness of what could be.
